change.title: Local diff review

diff --git a/src/lib.rs b/src/lib.rs

+++ b/src/lib.rs
@@ -1,3 +1,4 @@

+    // CERBERUS_FAKE_FINDING

context.summary: Local fixture for the offline Rust review core.
acceptance: The review path emits a schema-valid ReviewRunArtifact without network access.
